'''garate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zippily|zippily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-r-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zippily|zippily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| garate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:garate|garate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:garatesher|garatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:garatesherĂ«m|garatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:garatero|garatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:garateshĂ«|garateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:garateshĂ«m|garateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigaratero|gokigaratero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigarateshĂ«|gokigarateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigarateshĂ«m|gokigarateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogarankerom|gogarankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogarankeshĂ«|gogarankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogarankeshĂ«m|gogarankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogarankeya|gogarankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:garaterom|garaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:garatemu|garatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:garateya|garateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigaraterom|gokigaraterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigaratemu|gokigaratemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigarateya|gokigarateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:gararate|gararate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gararatesher|gararatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gararatesherĂ«m|gararatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gararatero|gararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gararateshĂ«|gararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gararateshĂ«m|gararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigararatero|gokigararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigararateshĂ«|gokigararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigararateshĂ«m|gokigararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogararankerom|gogararankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogararankeshĂ«|gogararankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogararankeshĂ«m|gogararankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogararankeya|gogararankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gararaterom|gararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gararatemu|gararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gararateya|gararateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigararaterom|gokigararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigararatemu|gokigararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigararateya|gokigararateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:gĂŠrĂŠte|gĂŠrĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gĂŠrĂŠtesher|gĂŠrĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m|gĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gĂŠrĂŠtero|gĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|gĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|gĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigĂŠrĂŠtero|gokigĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|gokigĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|gokigĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogĂŠrĂŠnkerom|gogĂŠrĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«|gogĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gogĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gĂŠrĂŠterom|gĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠrĂŠtemu|gĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gĂŠrĂŠteya|gĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigĂŠrĂŠterom|gokigĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigĂŠrĂŠtemu|gokigĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigĂŠrĂŠteya|gokigĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:gafrafte|gafrafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gafraftesher|gafraftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafraftesherĂ«m|gafraftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gafraftero|gafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gafrafteshĂ«|gafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafrafteshĂ«m|gafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigafraftero|gokigafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigafrafteshĂ«|gokigafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafrafteshĂ«m|gokigafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogafrafnkerom|gogafrafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogafrafnkeshĂ«|gogafrafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogafrafnkeshĂ«m|gogafrafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogafrafnkeya|gogafrafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gafrafterom|gafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafraftemu|gafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gafrafteya|gafrafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigafrafterom|gokigafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafraftemu|gokigafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigafrafteya|gokigafrafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
